---
title: "Final"
format: html
---

```{r}
#install.packages("bayesrules")
library(bayesrules)
data("moma")
```

```{r}
#Clean the Data
library(tidyverse)
moma_clean <- moma %>%
  drop_na()

```

```{r}
#Exploratory plot 1
ggplot(moma, aes(y = department, x = count, fill = gender)) +
  geom_boxplot() + scale_x_log10()
```

```{r}

```
